---
title: "Schedule"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Smaller font for compact display */
    width: 100%; /* Ensure the table fits within page width */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Tighter line spacing */
  }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; /* Reduce padding for compact layout */
    text-align: left; /* Left-align for readability */
    word-wrap: break-word; /* Wrap long text within cells */
    vertical-align: top; /* Align cell content to the top */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) {
    width: 5%; /* Day column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) {
    width: 8%; /* Date column */
  }
  .below-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Match the font size of the table */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Match line height */
    margin-top: 1rem; /* Add spacing above the text */
  }
</style>
```

# Course Schedule

::: overflow-table
| Day | Date | Topic | Videos | Notebook | Assessment | Materials |
|-----|------|-------|--------|----------|------------|-----------|
| 0 | Pre-course | Launchpad: Welcome, course setup, and Colab orientation | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb00_launchpad_course_setup_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Colab Readiness Check | Google Colab docs |
| 1 | Mon May 18 | Predictive analytics fundamentals, EDA, and data splitting | 6 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb01_eda_splits_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz | ISLP Ch 2<br>sklearn: cross-validation<br>Kaggle Learn: data leakage |
| 2 | Tue May 19 | Data setup and preprocessing pipelines (the professional way) | 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb02_preprocessing_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | sklearn: pipelines, ColumnTransformer<br>Pedregosa et al.: scikit-learn paper |
| 3 | Wed May 20 | Regression metrics and baseline modeling (with test-set lockbox discipline) | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb03_regression_metrics_baselines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>3-sentence Evaluation Note | ISLP: Model Assessment<br>sklearn: regression metrics |
| 4 | Thu May 21 | Linear regression that actually works: features, interactions, diagnostics | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb04_linear_features_diagnostics_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | ISLP Ch 3: Linear Regression<br>sklearn: LinearRegression, PolynomialFeatures |
| 5 | Fri May 22 | Regularization (Ridge/Lasso) + Project proposal sprint | **Synchronous lecture** + 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb05_regularization_project_proposal_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>**PROJECT MILESTONE 1: Proposal + Dataset** | ISLP Ch 6: Regularization<br>sklearn: Ridge/Lasso/ElasticNet |
| 6 | Mon May 25 | Logistic regression: probabilities, decision boundaries, and pipelines | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb06_logistic_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | ISLP Ch 4: Classification<br>sklearn: LogisticRegression |
| 7 | Tue May 26 | Classification metrics: confusion matrix, ROC and PR curves, and business costs | 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb07_classification_metrics_thresholding_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Threshold Recommendation | Fawcett: ROC analysis<br>Saito & Rehmsmeier: PR curves<br>sklearn: classification metrics |
| 8 | Wed May 27 | Resampling and CV: how to compare models without fooling yourself (k-fold + Student's *t* CIs) | 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb08_cross_validation_model_comparison_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | ISLP Ch 5: Resampling<br>sklearn: cross-validation utilities |
| 9 | Thu May 28 | Hyperparameter tuning + feature engineering + leakage detection (and Project baseline build) | 4 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb09_tuning_feature_engineering_project_baseline_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Project Baseline Draft | sklearn: GridSearchCV, RandomizedSearchCV<br>Provost & Fawcett: evaluation framing |
| 10 | Fri May 29 | Midterm: Business-case predictive strategy practicum + Project baseline submission | **Synchronous: Midterm exam** (Lockdown Browser) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb10_midterm_casebook_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | **MIDTERM (graded)**<br>**PROJECT MILESTONE 2: Baseline Model + Evaluation Plan** | Provost & Fawcett: business framing<br>sklearn: common pitfalls |
| 11 | Mon Jun 1 | Decision trees: interpretable models with sharp edges | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb11_decision_trees_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | ISLP Ch 8: Tree-Based Methods<br>sklearn: DecisionTree estimators |
| 12 | Tue Jun 2 | Random forests: bagging, OOB intuition, and feature importance | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb12_random_forests_importance_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | Breiman: Random Forests paper<br>sklearn: RandomForest, permutation importance |
| 13 | Wed Jun 3 | Gradient boosting: performance with discipline (and leakage avoidance) | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb13_gradient_boosting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | Friedman: Gradient Boosting Machine<br>sklearn: gradient boosting estimators |
| 14 | Thu Jun 4 | Model selection and comparison: making the call like a professional | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb14_model_selection_protocol_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | ISLP: Model Assessment<br>sklearn: model evaluation best practices |
| 15 | Fri Jun 5 | Final Project Milestone 03 Walkthrough — Complex Model + Hyperparameter Tuning + Draft Abstract | **Synchronous walkthrough** (no recorded videos) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb15_milestone_03_walkthrough_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>**PROJECT MILESTONE 3: More Complex Model + Hyperparameter Tuning + Draft Abstract + saved `champion_pipeline.joblib`** | M3 rubric: complex-model tuning, CI-overlap rule, draft abstract<br>sklearn: GridSearchCV, joblib persistence |
| 16 | Mon Jun 8 | Time-series forecasting: walk-forward CV, lag features, and baseline models | 3 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb16_time_series_forecasting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation | Hyndman & Athanasopoulos: FPP3 (otexts.com/fpp3)<br>sklearn: TimeSeriesSplit |
| 17 | Tue Jun 9 | Data communication and poster design: six principles (context, visualization, less-is-more, hierarchy, beauty, story) applied to the eleven-section research-poster architecture | 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb17_data_communication_poster_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Draft Poster Outline + Abstract | Tufte: data-ink ratio<br>Healy: Data Visualization<br>Knaflic: Storytelling with Data |
| 18 | Wed Jun 10 | Competition workflow: end-to-end pipeline from notebook to Kaggle submission | 2 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb18_competition_workflow_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | submission.csv to Kaggle | Chip Huyen: Designing ML Systems<br>sklearn: model persistence (joblib) |
| 19 | Thu Jun 11 | Deep learning (intuition videos, hands-on PyTorch training on FashionMNIST, when-to-use rubric, one tabular demo, and a hands-on large-language-model lab with Hugging Face) | 4 videos | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb19_deep_learning_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Four-Question Rubric | ISLP Ch. 10: Deep Learning<br>Goodfellow et al.: Deep Learning Book |
| 20 | Fri Jun 12 | Course end and reflection: final poster + Kaggle final submission + peer evaluation + reflection survey | **Synchronous closeout session** (no recorded videos) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026Summer_predictive_analytics_purdue_MGMT474/blob/main/notebooks/nb20_final_submission_peer_review_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | **PROJECT MILESTONE 4: Final Research Poster** (`<group-number>.pdf`) + **final notebook** (`NN_final.ipynb`)<br>**Intra-group Peer Evaluation** (Final Project + Case Competition)<br>**KAGGLE final submission** + `NN_kaggle_code.ipynb` (deadline 11:59 PM)<br>**REFLECTION SURVEY** (required for course completion) | Course rubric for M4 final poster<br>Purdue URC poster guidelines |

:::

::: below-table

## Core Course References

- **James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani.** *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* (ISLP) + Python labs. Download: [https://www.statlearning.com/](https://www.statlearning.com/){target="_blank"}
- **Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman.** *The Elements of Statistical Learning* (ESL).
- **Provost, Fawcett.** *Data Science for Business*.
- **Pedregosa et al.** "Scikit-learn: Machine Learning in Python." *JMLR*.
- **scikit-learn User Guide** (pipelines, preprocessing, model selection, metrics, inspection).
- **Chip Huyen.** *Designing Machine Learning Systems* (deployment thinking, monitoring).

:::
